title: Grammys 2026 Predictions: Best Rap Album Nominees
text: Rolling Stone predicts a showdown between two major contenders in the 2026 Best Rap Album category. The five predicted nominees are: Clipse - Let God Sort Em Out, J.I.D - God Does Like Ugly, Kendrick Lamar - GNX, Playboi Carti - I Am Music, Tyler, The Creator - CHROMAKOPIA. Expected Winner: Kendrick Lamar's GNX is predicted to take the award, riding momentum from his previous Grammy success and the album's commercial impact following his Drake dispute earlier in the year. Deserving Winner: The article argues Clipse should triumph, noting their reunion album represents a masterclass combining classic sound with contemporary production. Rob Markman, Genius VP of Music and Content, emphasizes the project's depth: They tell us hip-hop is a young man's game but Clipse demonstrates artists can grow and mature within the genre. Notable Themes: The article highlights that this year's rap albums showcase intentionality and storytelling. Clipse's record explores family themes beyond stereotypes, including pieces about parental loss and generational reflection. J.I.D's release positions him for mainstream breakthrough status, while Tyler's CHROMAKOPIA displays continued artistic evolution and thematic maturity.
